# opnsense_quagga_static_route (Resource)

Manages an FRR static route on OPNsense. Requires the `os-frr` plugin and an enabled `opnsense_quagga_static`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `network` (String) Destination network in CIDR notation.

### Optional

- `bfd` (Boolean) Enable BFD for this route. Defaults to `false`.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the route is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `gateway` (String) Next-hop gateway IP address.
- `interface` (String) Egress interface (alternative to gateway).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the static route.
